content:
cfallin labeled issue #1129:

It would be a fun experiment.

cfallin labeled issue #1129:

It would be a fun experiment.

cfallin closed issue #1129:

It would be a fun experiment.

cfallin commented on issue #1129:

We're doing old-issue triage and reviewed this issue today. While eBPF might be interesting as a target, it's quite different from other targets and with no clear user need arising in the past 7 years, I think we can probably close this issue. If any users spring up with strong needs and contributors are present to work on this, we can always re-open the discussion.
